title: Unidentified Nautolan Sith (Vendaxa)

{{Quote|You have betrayed my Emperor, sullied the Empire, killed my friends, and struck down she I have sworn on my life to protect! I will leave your bones for the beasts to crack!|Ganner Krieg|<ref name="Appears" />}}
This '''Sith''', a [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was a [[Sith/Legends|member]] of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[One Sith]] Order. He joined Krayt's [[Hand]]s, [[Darth Talon]] and [[Darth Nihl]], at a [[Skirmish on Vendaxa|skirmish]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vendaxa/Legends|Vendaxa]] in [[137 ABY]] where the crew of the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Mynock/Legends|''Mynock'']] was delivering the [[Fel Empire]] [[Prince/Legends|princess]], [[Marasiah Fel]], to a party of [[Imperial Knight]]s. This Sith engaged Knight [[Ganner Krieg]] after one of [[Unidentified Zabrak Sith (Male)|his comrades]] severely wounded Fel.

==History==
{{Quote|Who are you to deny us anything?|The Nautolan Sith to Antares Draco and Ganner Krieg|<ref name="Appears" />}}
This [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]] [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] joined [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Krayt]]'s [[One Sith]] Order<ref name="Appears" /> and completed his [[Sith training]], earning full-body [[Sith tattoo]]s,<ref name="Freddye">[[Freddye Lins]]' comments in the back of [[Legacy (2006) 39|''Legacy'' (2006) 39]]</ref> some time during or before the [[Second Imperial Civil War]]<ref name="Appears" /> broke out between [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Krayt's Galactic Empire]] and the former [[Fel Empire]], now the [[Empire-in-exile]].<ref name="Leg 1">[[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]]</ref> [[137 ABY|Seven years]] into the war, one of Krayt's two [[Hand (One Sith)|Hands]], [[Darth Talon]], was assigned the task of capturing the Empire-in-exile's [[Prince/Legends|princess]], [[Marasiah Fel]], with the hope that either she would flee and return to [[Roan Fel|her father]], the leader of the remnant, or he would try to rescue her.<ref name="Legacy 2006 3">[[Legacy (2006) 3|''Legacy'' (2006) 3]]</ref>

When Talon failed to capture her, Fel fell into the hands of former-[[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Cade Skywalker]], who escorted her, off the planet in his [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the [[Mynock (Helot-class)|''Mynock'']]. Talon followed them with a Sith force that included the Nautolan, to the planet [[Vendaxa/Legends|Vendaxa]], where Fel's group had arranged to meet [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Shado Vao]] and his [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Wolf Sazen]], so they could take her to safety. Darth Talon destroyed the Jedi duo's [[Transport/Legends|transport]] and engaged the group before being [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force_Push||propelled]] into the Vendaxan jungle by Skywalker. There, she organized the Sith into groups that would follow her and attack the group and those who would go with her fellow Hand, Darth Nihl to shoot down any inbound vessels in [[Predator-class fighter|''Predator''-class fighters]]. The Nautolan was part of the former.<ref name="Part5">[[Legacy (2006) 6|''Legacy'' (2006) 6]]</ref>

When two such ships arrived, they were quickly destroyed over the clearing where the ''Mynock'' had landed and Talon's group moved in, but Talon was wrong. Roan Fel was on neither ship, but the two [[Imperial Knight]]s who were, [[Ganner Krieg]] and [[Antares Draco]], survived the crash and fought with the ''Mynock'' crew against the Sith. During the [[Skirmish on Vendaxa|battle]], one of the [[Unidentified Zabrak Sith (Male)|Nautolan's allies]] injured Marasiah,<ref name="Part5" /> enraging Krieg who then fought the Nautolan and a cadre of Sith alone while Draco took the princess to safety aboard the ''Mynock''. With some [[Engine/Legends|engine]] difficulty, they were able to take off and escape.<ref name="Appears" />

==Personality and traits==
The [[Gender/Legends|male]] Nautolan Sith<ref name="Appears" /> was a fully-trained member of the One Sith Order led by Darth Krayt, signified by the red and [[black]] tattooing all over his body.<ref name="Freddye" /> He wielded a [[red]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] when he engaged Ganner Kreig on Vendaxa.<ref name="Appears" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Nautolan Sith appeared in the [[Legacy (2006) 7|seventh issue]] of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'', the final part of the [[Star Wars: Legacy: Broken|opening arc]]. While he was shown fighting Krieg in one panel, he never appears again.

==Appearances==
*[[Legacy (2006) 7|''Legacy'' (2006) 7]]
